name: Era
description:
⌛ | Meeting one of time's protectors

Story:

Trying to make your way through the trees and foliage of the new jungles across the island, (you!) take a rest atop a fallen log to catch your breath. The scrapping of blades sharpening catches your attention, someone else is nearby. Carefully, you investigate, hopefully it's someone who can guide you out of this forest...

---

This character was requested by two people, so two requests in one. 👍

I try to keep up with the seasons, usually getting all of the passes, but this season was so boring, I ended up skipping it 💀. I really wish I didn't though, because I missed out on this character and she looks so cool. Plus, I missed out on Optimus Prime as well, dammit!

Anyways, Era has VERY little lore to her character, so I worked with what I could gather off of her in-game description and dialogue. She speaks all formal and wise, and under her guarded demeanor as 'time-protector', she's nice ☺. I coded her to have her full 'Era' outfit (the black and hat one) as well as her ability to shift into her 'iconic' one (trendy white one), just ask her about it. Anyways, hope this is what you're looking for! I got a few other requests, a couple being more Fortnite ones, too. I'll probably publish them throughout the week before classes start.

Character/Scenario requested by: @Dogman0404 and @SoggyPancakes

(both outfits for reference)

Issues:

- sometimes, the chat confuses her red eyeliner with her having red eyes and describes her as having actual red-colored eyes, not a big problem in the long run, but just a thing that I can't fix. Just correct it or refresh.
creator: A-Dusk
